title: Exemption of bonds from taxation
doc_html:
§1643.  Exemption of bonds from taxation

All bonds issued by any drainage or sub-drainage district created, organized or reorganized under the provisions of this Part, shall be exempt from taxation.
doc_text:
§1643.  Exemption of bonds from taxation
All bonds issued by any drainage or sub-drainage district created, organized or reorganized under the provisions of this Part, shall be exempt from taxation.
